# DDGS (corn distillers' grains with solubles): ethanol byproduct
# ash. In monogastric (pig/poultry) diets it substitutes for both corn
# (energy) and soybean meal (protein) in roughly a 70/30 mass split. The
# default categorize_feeds output places it solely in the protein pool
# (driven by N content) which under-represents its dominant energy role
# and leaves DDGS surplus when protein is in oversupply globally — the
# excess then dumps to biomass disposal instead of feeding pigs.
